name: IT Consulting & Strategy
description: Strategic IT advisory covering digital transformation roadmaps, IT architecture reviews, technology selection, and process optimization. Bechtle consultants help mid-market and enterprise customers align IT investments with business objectives and build future-proof technology strategies.
target_audience: CIOs, IT directors, board-level decision makers
differentiators: Vendor-neutral strategic advice despite broad partnership ecosystem
Deep vertical expertise in public sector, manufacturing, and financial services
Local proximity through 80+ system house locations across DACH
